bodyText:
What is income tax filing & appeal services? Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, notice replies, CIT(A) and ITAT appeal representation.
Income Tax Filing & Appeal Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in West Bengal, West Bengal since 2012.
Quick Answer: Income Tax Services in West Bengal — Income tax return filing (ITR-1 to ITR-7), tax planning, notice replies, CIT(A) and ITAT appeal repr. From ₹1,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Income Tax Filing & Appeal Services in West Bengal
Virtual Auditor provides income tax filing & appeal services across West Bengal. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout West Bengal with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Kolkata handles company registrations and filings for West Bengal. Stamp duty: 0.15% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for West Bengal

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which ITR form should I file?
faqs.a: ITR-1 for salaried (up to ₹50L), ITR-2 for capital gains/multiple properties, ITR-3 for business income, ITR-4 for presumptive taxation.

faqs.q: What is the due date for ITR filing?
faqs.a: 31st July for individuals (non-audit), 31st October for audit cases, 30th November for transfer pricing.

faqs.q: Can you represent me in income tax appeals?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle CIT(A) appeals, ITAT appeals, Section 264 revisions, and settlement commission applications.

faqs.q: Do you provide income tax services services in West Bengal?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across West Bengal from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for West Bengal?
faqs.a: Companies registered in West Bengal fall under ROC Kolkata. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for West Bengal-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in West Bengal?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in West Bengal: 0.15% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
